Package org.frc5010.common.config.json

Class VisionPropertiesJson

java.lang.Object
org.frc5010.common.config.json.VisionPropertiesJson
public class VisionPropertiesJson extends Object
JSON class with an array of cameras to configure

  • Method Details

    • createCameraSystem

      public void createCameraSystem(GenericRobot robot, Map<String,CameraConfigurationJson> map)
      Creates cameras for a given robot using the provided map of camera configurations.
      Parameters:
      robot - the robot to add the cameras to
      map - a map of camera configurations, where the key is the camera name and the value is the configuration object

    • readCameraSystem

      public Map<String,CameraConfigurationJson> readCameraSystem(File directory) throws IOException
      Reads in cameras from the provided directory.
      Parameters:
      directory - the directory to read from
      Returns:
      the map of camera configurations
      Throws:
      IOException
